species: we first created a CS female mouse model according to previous studies
tissue: we chose the ovary for the crotonylome because it is significantly smaller than other major organs
sample_source: we also examined the pan-PTM in the plasma of clinical females with high HAM-A
age: mating started with 2-month-old control or CS female mice
cell_line: we switched the 293 T cell culture media from high- to low-glucose DMEM
sex: we first created a CS female mouse model
strain: mating started with 2-month-old control or CS female mice and control male mice (all are ICR strains)
